BodyName: Committee on Sanitation and Solid Waste Management

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to expanding the commercial citywide routing system for sidewalk cleanliness violations and technical amendments thereto, including to repeal and reenact subdivision c of section 16-118.1
Items.MatterName: Expanding the commercial citywide routing system for sidewalk cleanliness violations and technical amendments thereto, including to repeal and reenact subdivision c of section 16-118.1.

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to creating a commercial waste zones working group
Items.MatterName: Creating a commercial waste zones working group.

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to the collection and sale of organic waste and compost by community composters
Items.MatterName: Collection and sale of organic waste and compost by community composters.

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to requiring the department of sanitation to accept commercial solid waste at city-owned or operated marine transfer stations and city-owned or operated rail transfer stations
Items.MatterName: Requiring the department of sanitation to accept commercial solid waste at city-owned or operated marine transfer stations and city-owned or operated rail transfer stations.

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to establishing organic waste composting facilities in each borough
Items.MatterName: Establishing organic waste composting facilities in each borough.

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to the number of awardees in the Staten Island commercial waste zone and the implementation date for such commercial waste zone
Items.MatterName: The number of awardees in the Staten Island commercial waste zone and the implementation date for such commercial waste zone.
